summary: Backend-only regression + new cache-invalidation contract verified. 43/43 pytest passing (38 baseline + 5 new in test_cache_invalidation.py). Streamlit smoke test OK: /_stcore/health returns 'ok' (200) and / returns 200.
critical_code_review_comments: pandas.read_sql_query is called with raw psycopg2 connections in several modules (animal_page.py, test_stock_fk_garanhao.py) — pandas warns this is unsupported; consider migrating to SQLAlchemy engine to future-proof.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Streamlit app is served under supervisor service `streamlit` on port 3000. Do NOT touch supervisor services frontend/backend (FATAL by design). Run tests with: cd /app && TEST_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://embriovet_test:embriovet_test@localhost:5432/embriovet_test python -m pytest tests/ -q. Cache-invalidation contract enforced via modules.db.invalidate_data_cache() which no-ops outside Streamlit runtime.
